equivalence_argument: No complete mapping was found: the nodebuilder binary currently launches EthereumNode with a custom executor instead of RitualNode.

negative_search_evidence.missing_behavior: Missing binary launch path that instantiates RitualNode rather than EthereumNode and exposes the wrapper add-ons as the node runtime.
related_but_insufficient_code: crates/node/src/lib.rs defines RitualNode, but the binary path does not instantiate it.
The binary uses EthereumAddOns with an engine validator, not RitualAddOns/ValidationApi from the RitualNode wrapper.

rationale: The primary diff switches main.rs from EthereumNode::default() to RitualNode::default(), introduces ritual-node-core, and implements wrapper builders that delegate to Ethereum defaults plus RitualAddOns that merges ValidationApi into the Flashbots RPC module. No candidate in this bounded assignment contradicts or removes it.
statement: The ritual-reth binary should instantiate RitualNode rather than EthereumNode directly; the initial RitualNode implementation should use the default Ethereum pool, payload builder, network, executor, consensus, and engine validator components while exposing the validation API through the configured Flashbots RPC module.
suggested_falsification_tests: Start the binary and assert it constructs RitualNode components, still uses the Ethereum default pool/payload/network/executor/consensus behavior, and exposes the validation RPC module when the Flashbots module is configured.
summary: The ritual-reth binary does not launch the RitualNode wrapper.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Start or compile the binary launch path and assert its NodeBuilder type is RitualNode; current code selects EthereumNode instead.
title: Ritual binary launches RitualNode wrapper
